about: Senior technical professional focused on turning complex data into actionable decision-making tools.

projects.title: LLM Eval Harness
projects.description: An open-source evaluation framework for comparing LLM outputs across prompts, models, and datasets. Supports custom metrics, side-by-side diffs, and exports to JSONL for offline analysis.

projects.title: DataLineage CLI
projects.description: A command-line tool that parses SQL and dbt models to generate interactive lineage graphs, helping teams understand data dependencies at a glance.

projects.title: Semantic Search Engine
projects.description: A lightweight semantic search system built on sentence-transformers and FAISS, with a clean React frontend for querying local document collections.
